name: Mystic Probe
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>法</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ほう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>探</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>査</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>版</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can activate this card when a Continuous Spell Card is activated. Negate all Continuous Spell Cards during the turn this card is activated.
eff: You can activate this card when a Continuous Spell Card is activated. Negate all Continuous Spell Cards during the turn this card is activated.

mst: Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
